title.en: Get CORINE CLC raster for focus year

description.en: Selects and fetches the CORINE Land Cover (CLC) raster covering the European Union for the CORINE release year closest to the given population focus year, loading it directly from a remote Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (COG). Focus years 2015-2024 resolve to CORINE 2018; focus years 2011-2014 resolve to CORINE 2012. Returns both the raster and the resolved CORINE year

inputFile1_focusYear_rds.title: Population focus year
inputFile1_focusYear_rds.description: Path to an .rds file containing the focus year for population data as a single value, used to determine which CORINE CLC release year to fetch. Allowed years are 2011 through 2024.

corineCLC.title: CORINE CLC raster
corineCLC.description: The CORINE Land Cover raster (SpatRaster) covering the European Union, for the CORINE release year resolved from the focus year.

corine_year.title: Resolved CORINE year
corine_year.description: The CORINE CLC release year ('2018' or '2012') that was resolved from the input focus year and used to fetch the raster.
